NARRATIVE
============================================================

On 01/01/2023 at 00:03:22, CAD received a call for an unconscious person in Manhattan, NY 10002, assigned as an UNC severity level 2 response. The unit was first assigned at 00:08:20 and activated at 00:08:32, reflecting a dispatch response time of 298 seconds. The unit arrived on scene at 00:21:37, with a total incident response time of 1095 seconds and a travel time to scene of 797 seconds.

The crew remained on scene for approximately 20 minutes, departing at 00:41:37. The unit arrived at the receiving emergency department at 00:47:46, representing a transport interval of approximately 6 minutes and 9 seconds. The incident was closed at 01:39:16.

No video or audio events were available for extraction for this incident. As a result, patient identity, presenting clinical findings, vital signs, interventions, medications administered, procedures performed, and crew identifiers cannot be confirmed from the available evidence record. All clinical and operational details beyond those contained in the CAD data are documented as [UNCONFIRMED].

This PCR reflects CAD-sourced data only. Quality improvement review is recommended to obtain supplemental documentation from the responding crew.
